property.name: browser.fullName
property.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) HeadlessChrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

testcase.name: PeopleList should show Register button only for players
PeopleList should not show Register button for non-players
PeopleList onRegister sets selected person before navigating
PeopleList onRegister navigates to player-registration with personId
PeopleList onRegister stops event propagation to prevent row navigation
